title: lantana horrida subsp. zanonii
intro: Lantana horrida subsp. zanonii, a sub-species of the Lantana horrida plant, is a type of flowering shrub native to Southeast Asia, specifically in the Philippines. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lantana horrida subsp. zanonii include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as an anti-aging agent and a natural remedy for wounds. Herbal preparations of Lantana horrida subsp. zanonii include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
